16 Apr 2014

Shapify for Mac OS is now out!

16 Apr 2014

It's time for Mac users to celebrate because Shapify has finally hit the App Store! Whoop whoop! Now Mac users with recent versions of the Kinect sensor can have style and make 3D selfies at the same time!

The Shapify app is free to download and is available here

It's time to get Shapifying!

Your Shapify Team
